nasb.text: They also feared the Lord and appointed from among themselves priests of the high places, who acted for them in the houses of the high places.

esv.text: They also feared the Lord  and appointed from among themselves all sorts of people as priests of the high places, who sacrificed for them in the shrines of the high places.

cnv.text: 他們也懼怕耶和華，所以從他們中間選立邱壇的祭司，替他們在邱壇的廟裡獻祭。

ccb.text: 他们也敬拜耶和华，却委任各种人做祭司，在高岗上的神庙为他们献祭。
